Name: -1_art_wears_steve_decorating
Representative_Docs: ['Daniel has bad taste in clothing and personal style. He looks and smells like a bum and wears heavy winter clothes in the summer.', 'My friend Steve is very naive.  He could not tell a quality piece of art from a master to a doodle by someone passing time.', 'I had an employee several years ago that considered herself an artist, she was always whining about how difficult it was to create something that others didn\'t seem to appreciate - she was always looking for her "audience". The problem was that her esoteric leanings may have made a great deal of sense to her but the rest of the world saw them as poorly envisioned crap.']
